pi_items.source: Web request and curl verification - website is publicly accessible
Extracted from target_url and verified via DNS resolution
Screaming Frog SEO Spider has 'Googlebot (Smartphone)' as a preset user-agent option (verified via gofishdigital.com and screamingfrog.co.uk)
Verified as correct CSS attribute selector syntax per MDN Web Docs and CSS standards
Direct HTML inspection of https://books.toscrape.com/ via curl
Direct HTML inspection of https://books.toscrape.com/ via curl - meta tag contains content="width=device-width"

privileged_info_summary: The task targets https://books.toscrape.com/, a real public website. The expected user-agent 'Googlebot Smartphone' is a valid preset option in Screaming Frog SEO Spider. The viewport selector 'meta[name="viewport"]' is the correct CSS attribute selector for finding the viewport meta tag. The website contains a viewport meta tag with content='width=device-width', which is real web data (not synthetic). All metadata claims are factually accurate.
